CONTACT_FORM_INTERACTION.label: Form Interaction
CONTACT_FORM_INTERACTION.description: Triggered when a user opens a contact form or clicks an enquire button.

CONTACT_FORM_SUBMIT.label: Form Submission
CONTACT_FORM_SUBMIT.description: Triggered when a user successfully submits a contact form.

WHATSAPP_CHAT_CLICK.label: WhatsApp Icon Click
WHATSAPP_CHAT_CLICK.description: Triggered when a user clicks the WhatsApp float icon or link.

PHONE_CALL_CLICK.label: Phone Number Click
PHONE_CALL_CLICK.description: Triggered when a user clicks on a phone number or call button.

DOWNLOAD_BROCHURE_CLICK.label: Brochure Download Click
DOWNLOAD_BROCHURE_CLICK.description: Triggered when a user clicks the download brochure button.
